name: HWM_RULE_TMPLTS_VL
query: SELECT TMPLTS.RULE_TMPLTS_ID, TMPLTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TMPLTS.ENTERPRISE_ID, TMPLTS.PROCESS_TYPE, TMPLTS.PRS_FORMULA_ID, TMPLTS.PRS_SCRIPT_ID, TMPLTS.PROCESS_NAME, TMPLTS.TEMPLATE_TYPE, TMPLTS.TEMPLATE_NAME, TMPLTS.CLASSIFICATION, TMPLTS.RUN_SUMMATION_LEVEL, TMPLTS.RUN_TBB_LEVEL, TMPLTS.RULE_EXEC_TYPE, TMPLTS.RUN_EVENT_SAVE, TMPLTS.RUN_EVENT_SUB, TMPLTS.RUN_EVENT_RESUB, TMPLTS.RUN_EVENT_DELETE , TMPLTS.SUPPRESS_DUP_MSGS, TMPLTS.INCLUDE_EMPTY_TC, TMPLTS.SEEDED_FLAG, TMPLTS.RULE_SUB_TYPE, TMPLTS.FAST_FORMULA_EXEC_TYPE, TMPLTS.DFLT_ALLOCATION_ID , TMPLTS.JAVA_CLASS , TMPLTS.JAVA_METHOD , CASE WHEN TMPLTS_TL.TRANSLATED_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN TMPLTS_TL.TRANSLATED_NAME ELSE (select translated_name from HWM_RULE_TMPLTS_TL US_TL where TMPLTS.RULE_TMPLTS_ID = US_TL.RULE_TMPLTS_ID AND US_TL.LANGUAGE = 'US') END TRANSLATED_NAME, TMPLTS_TL.DESCRIPTION, TMPLTS_TL.RT_EXPLANATION, TMPLTS.CREATED_BY, TMPLTS.CREATION_DATE, TMPLTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TMPLTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TMPLTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, TMPLTS.MODULE_ID FROM HWM_RULE_TMPLTS TMPLTS, HWM_RULE_TMPLTS_TL TMPLTS_TL WHERE TMPLTS.RULE_TMPLTS_ID = TMPLTS_TL.RULE_TMPLTS_ID AND TMPLTS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
